title: helichrysum benthamii
intro: Helichrysum benthamii, also known as the mountain everlast or yellow everlast, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and silvery-gray foliage. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum benthamii have been found to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Helichrysum benthamii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
